task_completion.description: Configure the Ardour session tempo to 90 BPM
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Ardour transport/clock or tempo map should display a tempo of 90 BPM.

task_completion.description: Create or configure a track named 'Piano Loops' with -6 dB gain
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Ardour editor or mixer should show a track explicitly named 'Piano Loops' (or similar like 'piano_loops') with its volume fader set to approximately -6.0 dB.

task_completion.description: Create at least 3 audio regions on the track
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Ardour timeline should show at least 3 distinct, separated or sliced audio regions on the 'Piano Loops' track.

task_completion.description: Create at least 3 range markers with 'Loop' in their names
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Ardour marker/range lane (usually at the top of the timeline) should display at least 3 green range markers, each with a name containing 'Loop' (e.g., 'Loop 1', 'Loop 2').

task_completion.description: Export at least 2 WAV files to the delivery directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager or terminal window should show at least 2 '.wav' files located in '/home/ga/Audio/loop_pack_delivery/'.

task_completion.description: Create the pack_info.txt metadata file with required tokens
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output showing the contents of '/home/ga/Audio/loop_pack_delivery/pack_info.txt', which must include the words 'moonlight', '90', and 'minor'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Ardour GUI to configure the session
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with the Ardour application interface (timeline, mixer, export dialog) rather than just editing the session's XML file in a text editor.

integrity.description: WAV files were genuinely exported from Ardour
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should use Ardour's 'Export' dialog to generate the WAV files, rather than using terminal commands to simply copy and rename the source audio file into the delivery directory.

integrity.description: The agent manually created or edited the metadata file
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should be seen opening the submission spec, reading it, and using a text editor or standard echo commands to create pack_info.txt, rather than running a pre-written script to bypass the task.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target tempo is exactly 90 BPM. Track name must be 'Piano Loops' (case-insensitive variants allowed). Track gain must be approximately -6 dB. The Ardour session must contain at least 3 audio regions and 3 range markers containing 'Loop' in their names. The delivery directory '/home/ga/Audio/loop_pack_delivery/' must contain at least 2 exported WAV files and a 'pack_info.txt' file. The 'pack_info.txt' file must contain the keywords 'moonlight', '90', and 'minor'.
